title: Environment Contract and Diagnostic Baseline
target: Create, inspect, destroy, and recreate an isolated Kubernetes v1.35 lab twice, then produce a diagnostic remediation map.
acceptance: WSL2, systemd, cgroup v2, and native Docker are healthy
kubectl, kind, Helm 4, Helm 3 compatibility, and yq match pinned versions
The project kubeconfig is isolated from unrelated contexts
The pinned cluster lifecycle and smoke test pass twice
Every diagnostic Yellow or Red item has a scheduled follow-up
